description: Verify backend contracts are ready before the visual UI design phase begins.

command: import json, subprocess; data=json.loads(subprocess.check_output(['agent-system/bin/office-system','gui-state','--limit','1'], text=True)); assert data['digital_employees']['count'] >= 8; assert data['workflow_packs']['count'] >= 8; assert data['context_contract']['configured'] is True; assert any(item['name']=='claude-for-legal-zh' and item['status']=='installed_local' for item in data['skill_installations']['items']); assert 'digital_employee_registry' in [item['id'] for item in data['capabilities']]
